title: Field configuration schemes: Field limits for optimized performance
description:
To ensure your Jira apps remain fast and reliable, we’re introducing a limit on the number of fields you can add to a field configuration scheme. This change helps maintain site performance by preventing overly complex configurations that can slow down your experience. To get started with this change: Go to Settings, then Work items.
	Select Field configuration schemes.
	View your existing schemes and try to add a new field configuration to a scheme.
